# dotcommoners

> Open-source organization building high-performance, self-hostable infrastructure and systems software. Written primarily in Rust, Zig, and Python for self-hosters and platform engineers. Everything is open source (MIT) and designed to run on your own hardware with no vendor lock-in.

dotcommoners rebuilds the infrastructure most teams rent — orchestration, streaming, browser automation, observability — as open source you own and operate yourself.

## Site pages

- [Home](https://www.dotcommoners.com/): What dotcommoners is, the "own don't rent your infrastructure" thesis, project portfolio, and who it's for.
- [Projects](https://www.dotcommoners.com/projects): Full descriptions of every public open-source project with links to repos and docs.
- [About & Manifesto](https://www.dotcommoners.com/about): The open-source, self-hostable, no-lock-in philosophy; who's behind it; how to contribute.
- [FAQ](https://www.dotcommoners.com/faq): High-intent answers — is it MIT, can I self-host, what languages, how to contribute, vs SaaS.
- [Contact](https://www.dotcommoners.com/contact): Get in touch with the team.

## Public projects

- [Machineuse](https://github.com/dotcommoners/machineuse): Distributed container management for browser automation at scale. Create, schedule, and manage isolated browser instances across many worker nodes with intelligent scheduling, brokerless NNG messaging, and snapshot-based dormancy. Language: Python. Docs: https://docs.dotcommoners.com/machineuse/
- [RevenProx](https://github.com/dotcommoners/revenprox): A high-performance, horizontally scalable Server-Sent Events (SSE) proxy built in Zig for real-time event streaming at scale. Designed for 10M+ concurrent connections across 100+ instances using a brokerless NNG mesh, with JWT authentication and topic-based routing. Language: Zig. Docs: https://docs.dotcommoners.com/revenprox/

## Key facts

- Organization: dotcommoners (https://github.com/dotcommoners)
- License: MIT (permissive, open source)
- Deployment model: self-hosted / on-premise, no SaaS lock-in
- Primary languages: Rust, Zig, Python
- Documentation: https://docs.dotcommoners.com
- Contact: contact@dotcommoners.com

- Website: https://www.dotcommoners.com
- Full LLM context: https://www.dotcommoners.com/llms-full.txt
- GitHub: https://github.com/dotcommoners
